common.no_perms: You don't have permission to use this command.
help.title: Help — Categories
help.description: Use `/help <category>` to see available commands. You can also use `/help all` to see them all.
help.twitch.title: Twitch Commands
help.twitch.configure:
**`/configure <channel>`**
Sets the channel where live streams are announced.
help.twitch.add:
**`/add <username> [message] [mention] [roles]`**
Adds a Twitch streamer to monitor.
help.twitch.list:
**`/list`**
Shows monitored streamers and their status.
help.youtube.title: YouTube Commands
help.youtube.configure:
**`/configure-youtube <channel>`**
Channel where YouTube videos are posted.
help.youtube.configure_live:
**`/configure-youtube-live <channel>`**
Channel where YouTube live streams are posted.
help.youtube.add:
**`/add-youtube <username> [message] [mention] [roles]`**
Adds a YouTube channel to monitor.
help.youtube.edit:
**`/edit-youtube <username> [message] [mention] [roles]`**
Edits a YouTube channel's video settings.
help.youtube.add_live:
**`/add-youtube-live <username> [message] [mention] [roles]`**
Configures live stream settings for a YouTube channel.
help.admin.title: Admin Commands
help.admin.language:
**`/language <es|en|pl|ja>`**
Changes the bot's language for this server.
configure.twitch.success:
**Live streams** channel configured: {channel_mention}
 For YouTube: `/configure-youtube` (videos) and `/configure-youtube-live` (live streams).
streamer.added.title: Streamer added successfully
streamer.role_required: You must provide at least one role when selecting `mention: Specific role`.
streamer.list.empty: No streamers being monitored. Use `/add` to start.
streamer.list.title: Monitored Streamers
youtube.added.title: YouTube channel added
youtube.role_required: You must provide at least one role when selecting `role`.
youtube.list.title: YouTube Channels
cmd.configure.name: configure
cmd.configure.desc: Set the channel where Twitch live streams are announced
cmd.configure.param_channel: Channel where live stream announcements will be posted
cmd.configure_youtube.name: configure-youtube
cmd.configure_youtube.desc: Set the channel where YouTube videos (not live streams) are posted
cmd.configure_youtube.param_channel: Channel where YouTube videos will be posted
cmd.configure_youtube_live.name: configure-youtube-live
cmd.configure_youtube_live.desc: Set the channel where YouTube live streams are announced
cmd.configure_youtube_live.param_channel: Channel where YouTube live streams will be posted
cmd.add.name: add
cmd.add.desc: Add a Twitch streamer to monitor
cmd.add.param_message: Custom message when announcing the stream
cmd.add.param_role1: First role to mention (only if mention='role')
cmd.remove.name: remove
cmd.list.name: list
cmd.list.desc: Show the streamers you are monitoring
cmd.add_youtube.name: add-youtube
cmd.add_youtube.param_message: Custom message when announcing a new video
cmd.add_youtube.param_role1: First role to mention (only if mention='role')
cmd.remove_youtube.name: remove-youtube
cmd.remove_youtube.desc: Stop monitoring a YouTube channel (@username or ID)
cmd.list_youtube.name: list-youtube
cmd.edit_youtube.name: edit-youtube
cmd.edit_youtube.desc: Edit a monitored YouTube channel's video settings
cmd.edit_youtube.param_role1: First role to mention (only if mention='role')
cmd.add_youtube_live.name: add-youtube-live
cmd.add_youtube_live.desc: Set live stream settings for a YouTube channel
cmd.add_youtube_live.param_live_role1: First role for live (only if live_mention='role')
cmd.edit_twitch.name: edit-twitch
cmd.edit_twitch.desc: Edit a monitored Twitch streamer's settings
cmd.edit_twitch.param_message: New custom message when announcing the stream
cmd.edit_twitch.param_role1: First role to mention (only if mention='role')
cmd.language.name: language
jankenpon.usage:
**Let's play!**
Usage: `!jankenpon <move>`
Valid moves: `{examples}`
_This message will auto-delete._
jankenpon.invalid_move:
I don't recognize the move `{input}`.
Valid moves: `{examples}`
jankenpon.guild_only: This command only works in servers.
jankenpon.footer.autodelete: This message will auto-delete in a few seconds.
jankenpon.lb.empty: No one has played yet. Be the first with `!jankenpon rock`!
jankenpon.lb.footer.server: Server top 5 — use `!jankenpon-lb global` for the worldwide ranking.
jankenpon.lb.footer.global: Worldwide top 5 — XP summed across all servers.
error.channel_not_configured: Configure an announcement channel first with `/configure`.
error.unexpected: Something went wrong. The team has been notified.
